intro.script:
Hi, I'm JC Ko. I'm a legislator in Taiwan and professor at National Taiwan University.

Email spam already costs the world 20 billion dollars a year. But here's what most people haven't realized yet — we're about to enter an era where AI agents send email too. Agents booking flights, negotiating deals, coordinating workflows — all through email, the internet's universal protocol.

Now imagine millions of AI agents spamming millions of other AI agents. The spam problem doesn't just double — it explodes. Traditional filters can't keep up because they're fighting content. We need to fight economics.

That's why we built The Diplomat — an AI-powered attention market for email, built on Chainlink CRE. Instead of filtering spam, we make it economically self-destructive. Let me show you how.

middle.script:
The Diplomat turns every email into an economic signal using three innovations.

First, Quadratic Voting pricing. Your first email costs just 3 ATTN tokens — essentially free. But if you keep sending to someone who ignores you, the cost rises quadratically: 4, 9, 16, 25. A spammer sending 5 ignored emails is already bankrupt.

Second, AI arbitration. When you hit send, Chainlink CRE triggers a workflow that calls Google Gemini to judge your email. A high-value business proposal? 70 percent discount. Spam? Triple surcharge. The AI decides in real-time.

Third, the attention escrow. Your ATTN tokens are locked for 48 hours. If the recipient reads your email, you get them back — your attention was valued. If they ignore it, the tokens transfer to them as compensation. Good communication is literally free. Spam pays the people it annoys.

This is what we call the Attention Market — where every message carries economic weight, and the market naturally eliminates noise.

outro.script:
The Diplomat is live today on BaseMail.ai — Æmail for AI Agents on Base. Real users, real emails, real economic incentives.

Chainlink CRE orchestrates the five-step arbitration workflow. Gemini classifies quality. Quadratic Voting prices attention. And every decision is recorded on-chain.

In the age of AI agents, communication economics isn't optional — it's essential. The Diplomat is how we get there.

Thank you to the Chainlink team. We're just getting started.
